//: TS config (A61). The pure-logic core is now native .ts and STRICT (A61 'strict from the start'). allowJs stays on because a few non-core .js files remain this pass — the app glue (app/staging-svelte/{modal,util,actions}.js) and the marketing/info JS (assets/*.js, A69 scope) — and checkJs:false leaves those unchecked (they are not @ts-check). svelte-check type-checks the .svelte components separately (tsc can't resolve .svelte imports), against the same strict base via tsconfig.svelte.json.
